specific_mechanism: Antarctic icefish produce AFGPs that bind ice-crystal nuclei and prevent growth via non-colligative thermal hysteresis, allowing survival at -2°C ocean temperatures
llm_application: LLM training-loss antifreeze: detect early-stage gradient 'crystal nuclei' (e.g., correlated noise patterns) and bind them with anti-correlated update vectors before they grow into instability.
novelty_claim: No published 2024-2026 LLM work formalizes marine-biology phase-coherence mapping as proposed.
